title: AutoSprintMod
description: AutoSprintMod is a minimalist Fabric client-side mod for Minecraft 1.21+ that automatically keeps the Ctrl (sprint) key pressed.
body:
🏃 AutoSprintMod

Always sprint, never hold Ctrl again!

✨ Overview

AutoSprintMod is a lightweight client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21+.
It automatically keeps the sprint key (Ctrl) pressed, so you can move freely without worrying about holding it down.

Perfect for players who want smoother movement, less finger strain, and more comfort in PvP or survival!

⚡ Features

✔️ Always sprint when moving forward

✔️ Works on any server (client-side only)

✔️ Lightweight & conflict-free — no gameplay changes, just convenience

✔️ Plug-and-play: no settings required

🛠️ Requirements

Minecraft: 1.21-1.21.8

Fabric Loader: 0.15.11+

Fabric API: 0.102.1+1.21.1 or newer

⚠️ Notes

The mod is always enabled by default.
